use_cases: AI-powered customer support chat embedded in web applications
Multi-agent chat selection for different AI capabilities
Code assistance widget for developer documentation
Creative writing and analysis assistance chat
ai_summary: A floating chat widget component with multi-agent AI support, featuring smooth framer-motion animations and gradient-styled agent cards. Allows users to select from various AI assistants (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Copilot) with online status indicators. Includes message input with send functionality, avatar displays, and animated open/close transitions. Built on shadcn/ui components for consistency.
